structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-27 Retraction: Loan Assumption Process Change
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-27 13:17:06-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

A Capital Market’s announcement was issued on Monday (8/25) that stated NOVA was creating an in-house assumption process and that we would be handling these cases, going forward.  

 

However, after careful reconsideration, we have determined it is in the best interest of NOVA and its customers that our servicing partner, ServBank, completely handle the assumption process.  If you receive a new inquiry from a client, please direct them to NOVA’s Loan Servicing Group at our Corporate location (loanservicing@novahomeloans.com <mailto:loanservicing@novahomeloans.com> ). Loan servicing will coordinate next steps with the appropriate party within NOVA/ServBank for each customer so that an assumption can be considered. 

 

For customers who are currently/actively seeking an assumption and have started that process, information for all assumptions has been forwarded to NOVA/ServBank for processing. Customers can reach out to assumptions@servicingdivision.com <mailto:assumptions@servicingdivision.com>  or by calling 630-383-0114.

 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

For inquiries, contact:

 

Loan Servicing <mailto:loanservicing@novahomeloans.com>         Jana Gledhill <mailto:jana.gledhill@novahomeloans.com>         Ryan Vondrak <mailto:ryan.vondrak@novahomeloans.com>
